title: hieracium nigrescens subsp. mutilescens
intro: Hieracium nigrescens subsp. mutilescens, also known as a variant of the lesser hawk's-beard, is a plant species in the dandelion-like Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Hieracium nigrescens subsp. mutilescens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
